---
title: "Publications"
toc: true
toc-depth: 2
---

## Under Review

::: {.pub-item}
[**Cross Spectra Break the Single-Channel Impossibility**]{.pub-title}
[**Yuda Bi**, Vince D. Calhoun]{.pub-authors}
[Under review at *Physical Review Letters*]{.pub-venue}
:::

::: {.pub-item}
[**Why Single Probes Cannot Detect Hidden Forcing: A Quartic Detection Law**]{.pub-title}
[**Yuda Bi**, Vince D. Calhoun]{.pub-authors}
[Under review at *Physical Review Letters*]{.pub-venue}
:::

::: {.pub-item}
[**Grokking as a Falsifiable Finite-Size Transition**]{.pub-title}
[**Yuda Bi**, Chenyu Zhang, Qiheng Wang, Vince D. Calhoun]{.pub-authors}
[Under review at *Physical Review Letters*]{.pub-venue}
[arXiv](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.24746){.pub-link} [PDF](https://arxiv.org/pdf/2603.24746){.pub-pdf}
:::

::: {.pub-item}
[**Timescale Coalescence Makes Hidden Persistent Forcing Spectrally Dark**]{.pub-title}
[**Yuda Bi**, Chenyu Zhang, Vince D. Calhoun]{.pub-authors}
[Under review at *Physical Review E*]{.pub-venue}
[arXiv](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.20917){.pub-link} [PDF](https://arxiv.org/pdf/2603.20917){.pub-pdf}
:::

::: {.pub-item}
[**Conditioning on a Volatility Proxy Compresses the Apparent Timescale of Collective Market Correlation**]{.pub-title}
[**Yuda Bi**, Vince D. Calhoun]{.pub-authors}
[Under review at *Physical Review E*]{.pub-venue}
[arXiv](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.14072){.pub-link} [PDF](https://arxiv.org/pdf/2603.14072){.pub-pdf}
:::

::: {.pub-item}
[**Spectral Coherence Index: A Model-Free Metric for Protein Structural Ensemble Quality Assessment**]{.pub-title}
[**Yuda Bi**, Huaiwen Zhang, Jingnan Sun, Vince D. Calhoun]{.pub-authors}
[Under review at *IEEE Journal of Biomedical and Health Informatics*]{.pub-venue}
[arXiv](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.25880){.pub-link} [PDF](https://arxiv.org/pdf/2603.25880){.pub-pdf}
:::

::: {.pub-item}
[**Spectral Graph Features Capture Global Topology for Reference-free RNA 3D Structure Quality Assessment**]{.pub-title}
[Ying Zhu, Huaiwen Zhang, Vince D. Calhoun^†^, **Yuda Bi**^†^]{.pub-authors}
[Under review at *Briefings in Bioinformatics*]{.pub-venue}
:::

::: {.pub-item}
[**A 1/R Law for Kurtosis Contrast in Balanced Mixtures**]{.pub-title}
[**Yuda Bi**, Wenjun Xiao, Linhao Bai, Vince D. Calhoun]{.pub-authors}
[*IEEE Signal Processing Letters*]{.pub-venue}
[arXiv](https://arxiv.org/abs/2602.22334){.pub-link} [PDF](https://arxiv.org/pdf/2602.22334){.pub-pdf}
:::

## In Preparation

::: {.pub-item}
[**Gray Matter Morphometry Reveals a Soft Low-Rank Structure-Function Subspace**]{.pub-title}
[**Yuda Bi**, Vince D. Calhoun]{.pub-authors}
[In preparation for *NeuroImage*]{.pub-venue}
:::

## Journal Articles

::: {.pub-item}
[**Gray Matters: ViT-GAN Framework for Identifying Schizophrenia Biomarkers Linking Structural MRI and Functional Network Connectivity**]{.pub-title}
[**Yuda Bi**, Anees Abrol, Sihan Jia, Jing Sui, Vince D. Calhoun]{.pub-authors}
[*NeuroImage*, 297, 120674, 2024]{.pub-venue}
[DOI](https://doi.org/10.1016/j.neuroimage.2024.120674){.pub-link} [PDF](https://www.sciencedirect.com/science/article/pii/S1053811924001691/pdfft){.pub-pdf}
:::

::: {.pub-item}
[**A Multimodal Vision Transformer for Interpretable Fusion of Functional and Structural Neuroimaging Data**]{.pub-title}
[**Yuda Bi**, Anees Abrol, Zening Fu, Vince D. Calhoun]{.pub-authors}
[*Human Brain Mapping*, 45(17), e26783, 2024]{.pub-venue}
[DOI](https://doi.org/10.1002/hbm.26783){.pub-link} [PubMed](https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/39600159/){.pub-link} [PDF](https://onlinelibrary.wiley.com/doi/epdf/10.1002/hbm.26783){.pub-pdf}
:::

::: {.pub-item}
[**Prediction of Gender from Longitudinal MRI Data via Deep Learning on Adolescent Data Reveals Unique Patterns Associated with Brain Structure and Change over a Two-year Period**]{.pub-title}
[**Yuda Bi**, Anees Abrol, Zening Fu, Jiayu Chen, Jingyu Liu, Vince Calhoun]{.pub-authors}
[*Journal of Neuroscience Methods*, 384, 109744, 2023]{.pub-venue}
[DOI](https://doi.org/10.1016/j.jneumeth.2022.109744){.pub-link}
:::

## Conference Papers

::: {.pub-item}
[**MultiViT2: A Data-augmented Multimodal Neuroimaging Prediction Framework via Latent Diffusion Model**]{.pub-title}
[**Yuda Bi**, Sihan Jia, Yutong Gao, Anees Abrol, Zening Fu, Vince D. Calhoun]{.pub-authors}
[*IEEE ISBI*, 2025]{.pub-venue}
[arXiv](https://arxiv.org/abs/2506.13667){.pub-link} [PDF](https://arxiv.org/pdf/2506.13667){.pub-pdf}
:::

::: {.pub-item}
[**GM-LDM: Latent Diffusion Model for Brain Biomarker Identification through Functional Data-Driven Gray Matter Synthesis**]{.pub-title}
[Xu Hu, Jingling Yang, Sihan Jia, **Yuda Bi**, Vince D. Calhoun]{.pub-authors}
[*IEEE ISBI*, 2025]{.pub-venue}
[arXiv](https://arxiv.org/abs/2506.12719){.pub-link} [PDF](https://arxiv.org/pdf/2506.12719){.pub-pdf}
:::

::: {.pub-item}
[**Cross-Modal Synthesis of Structural MRI and Functional Connectivity Networks via Conditional ViT-GANs**]{.pub-title}
[**Yuda Bi**, Anees Abrol, Jing Sui, Vince D. Calhoun]{.pub-authors}
[*IEEE ISBI*, 2024]{.pub-venue}
[arXiv](https://arxiv.org/abs/2309.08160){.pub-link} [IEEE](https://ieeexplore.ieee.org/document/10446450){.pub-link}
:::

::: {.pub-item}
[**MultiViT: Multimodal Vision Transformer for Schizophrenia Prediction using Structural MRI and Functional Network Connectivity Data**]{.pub-title}
[**Yuda Bi**, Anees Abrol, Zening Fu, Vince D. Calhoun]{.pub-authors}
[*IEEE ISBI*, 2023]{.pub-venue}
[IEEE](https://ieeexplore.ieee.org/document/10230385){.pub-link}
:::

::: {.pub-item}
[**Deep Learning Prediction and Visualization of Gender Related Brain Changes from Longitudinal Structural MRI Data in the ABCD Study**]{.pub-title}
[**Yuda Bi**, Anees Abrol, Zening Fu, Vince D. Calhoun]{.pub-authors}
[*IEEE EMBC*, 2022]{.pub-venue}
[IEEE](https://ieeexplore.ieee.org/document/9871150){.pub-link}
:::
